RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOULE, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON MARCH 12, 1997 $2,295.00 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,975.00, LEASE FORFEITED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, RICHARD E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOULE, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 744 DIVISIDERO ST, #6, S.F. CA.
